guidance: FY27 revenue growth guided ~75% on 3.1 GW book and group synergies.
FY27 EBITDA margin targeted 20%+; ~₹5,000cr revenue implied.
4.X MW turbine platform ramp to drive execution and share gains.
insights: Q4 revenue flat ~₹1,306cr; PAT ₹106cr, net profit ₹91cr down 51% YoY.
Order book ~3.1 GW; ~600 MW fresh FY26 wins (Aditya Birla, Gentari, Jakson).
Geopolitical disruption hit ECS supply/logistics; some customers deferred payments.
Strategic pivot to equipment supply and O&M; robust pipeline exceeding 2 GW.
concall.orderExecution: 3.1 GW book executable over ~2 years; FY27 positioned as the sharp ramp-up year.
concall.source: Inox Wind Q4 FY26 concall, ~May 2026; Quartr, Yahoo, SaurEnergy, Power Peak Digest, TradeBrains
